offer: Goblins lurk beyond the southern gate.
Slay three of them, then return to me.
progress: The wilderness still has goblins to cull.
ready: You have thinned the goblin pack. Claim your reward.
complete: Haven is safer thanks to you.

offer: Bring me a health potion for the stockroom.
progress: I still need a health potion. Check loot from monsters or your bag.
ready: Perfect — that potion will help. Take your payment.
complete: Stay rested while you are in town.

offer: Eldon should hear that our supplies are replenished.
Speak with him at the square.
progress: Find Eldon in town and let him know.
atTarget: Ah, Mira sent word about the supplies?
ready: Eldon knows the news. Here is a little something for the errand.
complete: The town council appreciates reliable couriers.

offer: Skeletons gather in the Dark Forest beyond the wilderness.
Take the northwest portal and slay five of them.
progress: The forest still crawls with skeletons.
ready: The patrol route is clear. Well fought.
complete: Haven sleeps easier with the forest thinned.

offer: Bats nest in the Scorched Desert to the northeast.
Cull five before they spread toward the wilderness.
progress: The desert still swarms with bats.
ready: The scourge is beaten back. Take your pay.
complete: Travelers can cross the dunes more safely now.

offer: Scouts heading into the wilderness need mana potions.
Bring me one — buy from Brok or loot it from the frontier.
progress: I still need a mana potion for the frontier kits.
ready: This will keep the patrols casting. Thank you.
complete: Rest up before you push deeper toward the dungeon.
